div.p: Uses the skip-list formula: floor(-ln(rand()) * ml) New Node ID: 105 is assigned to Max Layer: 2.
Start at global entry_point (Node 42) on highest Layer 3. Greedily move to closest neighbor at each layer until reaching Layer 3.
At Layers 2, 1, and 0, execute search_layer with ef=200. Collect best candidates to connect to the new node.
New Node 105 connects to selected neighbors. Neighbors MUST update their lists to point back to 105.
If Neighbor 12 now has M > M_max (e.g., > 16 edges), re-sort neighbors by distance and PRUNE the farthest.

ul.li: efConstruction: Search beam width during build
